headline: The Hershey Company (HSY) Partners With Lindt, Mars, Mondelez, Nestlé on TogetherCocoa
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 12 Top Performing Consumer Staples Stocks in February. The Hershey Company (NYSE:HSY) is one of the best performing stocks. TheFly reported on February 24 that Mizuho increased its price target for HSY from $165 to $195 while retaining a Neutral rating on the stock. Recently, on February 23, […]
